MSDAT Documentation

Introduction to MSDAT

Quick Start →

Visual Interface

To provide a visual interface that eliminates delays in making key decisions by top stakeholders and medical practitioners.

Easy Access

To provide quick and easy access to health data for analysis and interpretation

Accessibility

To make accessible comparison of key health indicators across data sources.

Graphical

To present key health trends via graphs and charts as a premise to gain insights and make quick decisions.

Made by e4e with ❤️
